name: changelogsmith
description: Automated changelogs and release drafts for GitHub repositories.
author: Nillan Sivarasa

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/events/pull-request-closed.js && node --check src/changelog/create-entry.js && node --check src/changelog/generate-changelog.js && node --check src/changelog/sections.js && node --check src/github/comments.js
scripts.validate: npm run check && npm run lint && npm test
